responses.Profiling tool priority: Chrome DevTools Lighthouse first, then React Profiler, then bundle analyzer
responses.User journey selection: Top 5 most frequent: login, dashboard load, data table scroll, form submission, search
responses.Benchmark baseline: Run Lighthouse 3 times in incognito, take median scores
responses.Report format: Executive summary + detailed findings + roadmap with effort estimates
responses.Quick win threshold: High impact (> 10% improvement) + Low effort (< 2 hours)
responses.Database profiling: Enable slow query log, analyze with EXPLAIN, check index usage
responses.Bundle analysis: Use webpack-bundle-analyzer with stat size, identify large dependencies
responses.Memory profiling: Take heap snapshots before/after critical journeys, compare retained size
